success_criteria: CI proves install import CLI and tests
Docs are honest about v0 maturity
Repo uses its own workspace model for real work
goals.title: Make Palari Company OS a professional Python CLI foundation

success_criteria: Work can move from scope to evidence to review to human decision
Future broker or policy work stays clearly out of scope until designed
goals.title: Grow the product model without bringing back old ticket ceremony

humans.name: Rafa Founder
humans.capacity_signal: Sets direction and accepts repo milestones

humans.name: Codex Maintainer
humans.capacity_signal: Can implement and review repo-local changes; cannot self-accept founder authority

palaris.name: Steward
palaris.scope: Keeps Palari Company OS maintainable, verifiable, and honest about maturity.

forbidden_actions: change authority policy without human decision
standards: prefer adaptive intensity over fixed ceremony
palaris.name: Architect
palaris.scope: Turns operating lessons into product model changes without adding ceremony for its own sake.

work_items.title: Complete strict validation history and repo hygiene foundation
work_items.scope: Represent the recent strict validation fixtures, append-only workspace history, professional metadata, CI, install smoke, and maturity documentation as one completed repo foundation milestone.
work_items.acceptance_target: Main contains the validation/history/hygiene commits, verification passes, GitHub CI passes, and the result is captured as dogfood history.

work_items.title: Add workspace init and seed ergonomics
work_items.scope: Create a small command or documented path for initializing a blank workspace without hand-writing the shell JSON.
work_items.acceptance_target: A new maintainer can create a valid empty workspace with one command and then add records through the CLI.

work_items.title: Split larger workspaces into maintainable source files
work_items.scope: Design and implement a simple multi-file workspace layout while preserving workspace.json compatibility and validation clarity.
work_items.acceptance_target: The dogfood workspace can grow without one giant JSON file and existing single-file workspaces still load.

verification_expectations: queue recommendation tests if model fields change
work_items.title: Design adaptive intensity for task sizing
work_items.scope: Turn the product idea of model-relative task sizing into concrete workspace fields and queue guidance without forcing subticket ceremony.
work_items.acceptance_target: Docs and model guidance explain when a stronger model can safely handle larger scoped work and when decomposition is required.

work_items.title: Define future broker and policy boundary roadmap
work_items.scope: Decide the minimum safety design before any real broker execution or policy acceptance can exist.
work_items.acceptance_target: Founder-approved design constraints exist before implementation starts.

attempts.result: Strict validation fixtures, append-only history, repository hygiene, install smoke, and CI were implemented and pushed to origin/main.

evidence_runs.summary: Local verification and GitHub CI passed for the repo foundation milestone.

residual_risks: The workspace is still a single JSON file
Dogfood records are manually curated by CLI commands
No concurrent merge model exists yet

tradeoffs: Fast demos are tempting but risky
Mock-only work preserves learning without side effects
Real authority requires custody and audit
decisions.question: What is the minimum safety design before Palari Company OS can execute broker actions or real policy authority?
decisions.context: The v0.1 foundation intentionally keeps broker execution and policy acceptance disabled.
decisions.recommendation: Keep broker and policy work documentation-only until signed gates, custody, audit, and human quorum are designed.
decisions.safe_default: Do not implement external side effects.

useful: The CLI could author most records directly
The queue model cleanly identifies evidence review decision and integration states
Install smoke exposed a real Python 3.10 compatibility bug before closeout
failed: There is no init workspace command
Long list fields through CLI flags are awkward
Review findings cannot yet be structured through first-class CLI flags
follow_up_needed: Add a workspace init command later
Consider import/export or seed helpers for larger workspaces
Keep dogfood workspace updated as repo maturity work continues
model_worker_notes: Dogfooding was feasible with ordinary CLI commands after seeding the empty workspace shell
outcomes.summary: The repo reached a cleaner v0.1 foundation with verification, install smoke, CI, and honest maturity docs.
outcomes.what_happened: The recent validation, history, and hygiene work was merged to main and then represented inside the dogfood workspace.
outcomes.what_changed: Palari Company OS now has a real internal workspace that can track its own next repo maturity work.
